meaning: n.[蛹ｻ]關･蜈ｻ諤ｧ陦ｰ遶ｭ,逕滓ｴｻ蜉帷ｼｺ螟ｱ
examples: The exact cause of cerebellar abiotrophy is not known, but it is thought to be due to an intrinsic metabolic defect.
Abiotrophy resulted from soil fertility inadequacy was a main limiting factor for the growth and development of apple trees in this region.
